calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-30-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Leona Luckett.
Attorney Paul Hogarth appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Paul Labriola is present.
Attorney Shannon Fagan representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Sep-4-2012 remains on calendar.(501/JPT)
